allow:
Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add complete isolated demo ecosystem system with admin UI

Implemented a fully featured demo system that allows prospects to experience
the platform through gated demo codes with isolated data ecosystems.

Backend Changes:
- Added demoCodes and demoSessions tables to schema
- Extended all main tables with demoCodeId for cascade delete isolation
- Created complete provisioning system for demo ecosystems
- Implemented 12 new storage methods for demo code management
- Added 8 demo API endpoints (public validation/login + admin CRUD)
- Built CLI tools for creating codes and purging expired demos
- Added super admin access control via environment variable

Frontend Changes:
- Created DemoCodeEntry splash page with code validation
- Built DemoPersonaSelect page with 4 persona cards
- Added admin UI with list, form, and stats pages
- Updated Landing page with "View Demo" button
- Integrated demo routes into main app routing
- Added 7 demo-related API client methods

Demo Ecosystem Features:
- Each demo code provisions: 1 mgmt company, 2 communities, 4 users, 4 form templates, 30 sample applications
- 4 personas: Management Manager, Board Member, Homeowner, Contributor
- Scheduled availability with date ranges and optional usage limits
- Session tracking for analytics
- Safe cleanup with cascade delete

Documentation:
- Created comprehensive demo system guide
- Updated session handoff with implementation details
- Added .env.example for super admin configuration
- Documented all API endpoints and CLI commands

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git -C /home/runner/workspace commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix demo user dashboard 404 by forcing full page reload after login

Changed navigation method in DemoPersonaSelect from wouter navigate() to
window.location.href to ensure authentication state is properly refreshed
after demo login. This prevents React Query from using cached unauthorized
responses and allows demo users to access the dashboard correctly.

The role-based dashboard system was already fully implemented with:
- ManagementDashboard for management company managers
- BoardMemberDashboard for POA/HOA board members
- ContributorDashboard for non-voting board contributors
- HomeownerDashboard for residents
- Auto-role detection via useUserTenants hook

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
